headline: EQT (EQT): 3 Reasons We Love This Stock
summary: Over the past six months, EQT’s shares (currently trading at $51.47) have posted a disappointing 5.3% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 12.4% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
